title: The gen/ folder contains auto-generated code and must never be manually edited
content:
When Powerhouse generates code for a document model (either automatically via Vetra or manually via `ph generate`), it creates two key directories:

- **`gen/`** - Auto-generated code that must NOT be manually edited. It will be overwritten on regeneration. Contains:
  - `types.ts` - TypeScript interfaces from GraphQL schema (state types, input types)
  - `creators.ts` - Action creator functions (e.g., `addTodoItem({ text: '...' })`)
  - `utils.ts` - Utility functions including `createDocument()`
  - `reducer.ts` - Reducer interface definition
  - Module-specific operation types

- **`src/`** - Your custom implementation. Contains:
  - `reducers/` - Skeleton reducer files with function stubs for each operation
  - `tests/` - Test file scaffolding

This separation ensures generated code stays in sync with specifications while preserving your custom business logic.
description: Generated TypeScript types, action creators, and utilities in gen/ are overwritten on regeneration. Custom logic goes in src/.
